message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction

actor "User" as user
rectangle "Website" as website
rectangle "Web Server" as webserver
rectangle "Filesystem Server" as fileserver
database "PC Filesystem" as filesystem

note top: VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)

user -> website : opens
activate website
website -> webserver : initialize
note right of webserver: http://localhost:8080/
website -> fileserver : initialize
note right of fileserver: http://localhost:8090/
fileserver -> filesystem : read
filesystem -->> fileserver : return default directory
note left of filesystem: .../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"
fileserver -->> website : provide directories
website -->> user : display Syncfusion FileManager component
deactivate website
deactivate webserver
deactivate fileserver
deactivate filesystem

@enduml
```
